Module 4:
Creating Prelaunch Content,
Part 5
!
Executive Summary
• 	We're now going to go through some of the other types of pre-launch
content.
• 	Audio - generally not recommended, but can be done
• 	You can turn it into screencapture and it will raise perceived value
dramatically
• 	PDF reports
• 	Effective especially when combined with video
• 	Can be a written report, process map, mind map, flowchart,
infographic
• 	High perceived value, can be great for getting opt ins
• 	Webinar or teleseminar
• 	Can use this during your prelaunch or after you open cart (I like to
use it after open cart)
• 	Freeconferencecalling.com
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 1 of 2 --

• 	InstantTeleseminar.com
• 	GoToWebinar.com
• 	Software
• 	You can give away software as a piece of prelaunch content
• 	Can be very effective - but not something I’ve personally done
!
Summary & Things to Remember
“Horses for courses” - what you use depends on your situation and what
your personal assets are
Video is really great for lot of situations - it's good for you to get
comfortable with video
If you use video show your personality, be natural, be human
With video it's a lot easier to appear human and be approachable/
personable than it is for most people to do in writing
The camera is not important
Audio quality is important
Use the minimum tools necessary to get the job done
It is about progress, it's not about perfection
!
